text: Sitges Pride takes place in June in the picturesque coastal town of Sitges, Spain. It is renowned for its open-air beach parties, parades, and inclusive atmosphere, drawing visitors from all over Europe.

Madrid Pride, known as MADO (Madrid Orgullo), is one of the largest Pride festivals in Europe. Taking place in early July, the entire city, especially the Chueca neighborhood, turns into a massive, multi-day celebration.

The Folsom Street Fair in San Francisco takes place every September and is the world's largest leather and fetish event. It is a cornerstone of alternative gay travel and celebrates body positivity and kink.
